**For fund-handling bugs (escrow, payout, fees)**
If this could affect balances, describe the exact scenario (bet amounts,
outcomes, sequence of calls) that produces an incorrect result. If it's
a suspected vulnerability on a *live* deployment with real funds, do not
post it here — see the Security section in CONTRIBUTING.md instead.
